title: Resonance & Response
description: An Axis Syllabus and Contact Improvisation Workshop with Marcus van Duren and Emily Jones

title: Kinetic Waves
theme: Dancing is Walking, Feet and Spine
description:
Friday Morning Dance Class rooted in the study and application of The Axis Syllabus©

Facilitated by AS Teacher Candidate, Marcus van Duren

$20 drop in / Notaflof

A typical session includes zooming in on anatomy, bio-mechanics, movement motifs, improvisation, and grooving to music.
